name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students
description: Provides financial assistance to meritorious students from low-income families to meet their day-to-day expenses while pursuing higher studies.
education_requirement: Above 80th percentile in Class 12 and pursuing regular degree course
benefits: Rs. 12,000 per annum for graduation (first 3 years) and Rs. 20,000 per annum for post-graduation.

eligibility_rules.description: Annual family income must not exceed Rs. 4,50,000.
Must be pursuing a regular higher education degree course.
Must be currently studying as a regular student.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for Scheduled Caste Students (Karnataka)
description: Financial assistance to Scheduled Caste students residing in Karnataka who are pursuing post-matric studies.
education_requirement: Class 10 completed, pursuing post-matric courses (Class 11, Diploma, Degree, or PG)
required_documents: Aadhaar Card linked to Bank Account
benefits: Reimbursement of tuition fees, admission fees, and monthly maintenance allowance.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a permanent resident of Karnataka.
Must belong to the Scheduled Caste (SC) category.
Annual family income must not exceed Rs. 2,50,000.
Must be currently enrolled in a post-matric course.

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students
description: An initiative by AICTE to support girl students pursuing technical education (Degree or Diploma) in recognized institutions.
education_requirement: Admitted to 1st year of Degree/Diploma course or 2nd year via lateral entry
required_documents: Declaration of single/two girl child status
benefits: Rs. 50,000 per annum for course duration as a lump sum amount for college fee, computer purchase, books, etc.

eligibility_rules.description: Annual family income must not exceed Rs. 8,00,000.
Must be studying in an AICTE-approved institution.

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme (NMMSS)
description: Scholarships to meritorious students of economically weaker sections to prevent them from dropping out at Class 8 and encourage them to continue secondary education.
education_requirement: Studying in Class 9, scored minimum 55% (50% for SC/ST) in Class 8
benefits: Rs. 12,000 per annum (Rs. 1,000 per month) from Class 9 to Class 12.

eligibility_rules.description: Annual family income must not exceed Rs. 3,50,000.
Must be currently studying in Class 9 in a government/local body school.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students (Karnataka)
description: Provides tuition fee concession and maintenance allowance to OBC category students (Cat-1, 2A, 3A, 3B) in Karnataka pursuing post-matric courses.
required_documents: Caste and Income Certificate (RD number verified)
Aadhaar Card linked to Bank Account
benefits: Tuition fee concession and monthly maintenance allowance.

eligibility_rules.description: Must be a permanent resident of Karnataka.
Annual family income must not exceed Rs. 2,50,000 for Cat-1 (Rs. 1,00,000 for other sub-casts).
Must be currently studying in a post-matric course.

name: Post-Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
description: Provides financial support to students with disabilities to enable them to pursue post-matric or post-secondary courses.
benefits: Monthly maintenance allowance, book grant, and tuition fee reimbursement.

eligibility_rules.description: Annual family income must not exceed Rs. 2,50,000.
Must be pursuing a post-matric course.
